'''√s-y-k''' ('''kasayak''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quadrichotomize|quadrichotomize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-y-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quadrichotomize|quadrichotomize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| √s-y-k
|-
! Lemma
| kasayak
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || thisayak || jisayak || shisayak || kisayak
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || thuthusayak || jujusayak || shushusayak || kukusayak
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || thusayak || jusayak || shusayak || kusayak
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || thusayak || jusayak || shusayak || kusayak
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || thesayak || jesayak || shesayak || kesayak
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || thothosayak || jojosayak || shoshosayak || kokosayak
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || thosayak || josayak || shosayak || kosayak
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || thosayak || josayak || shosayak || kosayak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || sayak || sayak || sayak || sayak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || sayak || sayak || sayak || sayak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || sayak || sayak || sayak || sayak
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || sayak || sayak || sayak || sayak
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || thæsayak || jæsayak || shæsayak || kæsayak
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || thathasayak || jajasayak || shashasayak || kakasayak
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || thasayak || jasayak || shasayak || kasayak
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || thasayak || jasayak || shasayak || kasayak
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || shasayak
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || goshasayak
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || gokishasayak
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || shasayaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || goshasayaknknü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || gokishasayaknü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || shasayakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || goshasayaknkshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || gokishasayakshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || shasayakro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || goshasayaknkro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || gokishasayakro
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || shasayakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || goshasayaknkmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || gokishasayakmu
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || shasayaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || goshasayaknksher
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || gokishasayaksher
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || shasayakng
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || goshasayaknkng
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || gokishasayakng
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || shasayakya
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || goshasayaknkya
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || gokishasayakya
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || shasayakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || goshasayaknkyam
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || gokishasayakyam
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || shasayaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || goshasayaknknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || gokishasayaknüshë
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || shasayaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasayaknknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasayaknüro
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || shasayaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || goshasayaknknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasayaknümu
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || shasayakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || goshasayaknkshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || gokishasayakshënü
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || shasayakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasayaknkshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasayakshëro
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || shasayakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || goshasayaknkshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasayakshëmu
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || shasayakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || goshasayaknkronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || gokishasayakronü
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || shasayakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || goshasayaknkroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || gokishasayakroshë
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || shasayakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || goshasayaknkromu
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || gokishasayakromu
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || shasayakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || goshasayaknkmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || gokishasayakmunü
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || shasayakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || goshasayaknkmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || gokishasayakmushë
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || shasayakmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || goshasayaknkmuro
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || gokishasayakmuro
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
